ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "air_quality" REAL /* Air quality reading */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the data is valid */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing any validation issues with the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., IoT device, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "installation_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sensor is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the sensor */,
  "supported_parameters" TEXT /* Environmental parameters the sensor can measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "environmental_zone" TEXT /* Type of environmental zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "threshold_min" REAL /* Minimum threshold for the validation rule */,
  "threshold_max" REAL /* Maximum threshold for the validation rule */,
  "action_on_failure" TEXT /* Action to take when the rule fails (e.g., log, alert, discard) */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Sensor type for which the validation rule applies */,
  "validation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of validation (e.g., real-time, hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_provider" TEXT /* Provider who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the data */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, HTML) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
